reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status, sent a math question, received a response, and confirmed the answer "4" was included in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing "Your Agents" with three agents listed in the sidebar.
Found agent "QA-20260501-015415-wgnn" in the sidebar and clicked it — Agent page loaded with the agent name displayed at the top and status showing "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status clearly shows "idle" in the top-right status indicator.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" by typing in the message input field and clicking the send button — Message was successfully submitted to the agent and the page transitioned to the chat view.

Waited for response up to 3 minutes — Agent responded immediately with the answer "4" displayed in the chat view. The agent status transitioned to "working" during processing and returned to "idle" after completion.

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — The agent's response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question. Screenshot saved as step6-agent-response.png showing the full conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4".
